description: Patch: prevent DevFlow template manifests from owning user runtime files, and force UTF-8 for Windows hook I/O.
changelog:
**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(uninstall): `devflow init` now tracks platform/root template hashes from files actually written by DevFlow instead of walking `.codex/`, `.claude/`, and other platform dirs that can contain user runtime data.
- fix(uninstall): `devflow update` and `devflow uninstall` prune orphan `.devflow/.template-hashes.json` entries before planning, preserving user-owned files from manifests created by older versions.
- fix(hooks): Windows hook templates force UTF-8 for stdin, stdout, and stderr so non-ASCII task names and prompt payloads do not fail under cp936/cp1252 code pages.
notes: Run `devflow update` to pull in the manifest ownership fixes and updated hook templates. No migration required because file paths did not change.
